title: aningeria altissima
intro: Aningeria altissima, also known as the 'African walnut' or 'Aningeria', is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aningeria altissima include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in traditional African medicine. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, as well as being used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
